title: The Excel Speed Blueprint
subtitle: 2026 Edition
description: A role-based shortcut system built for Excel 365 as it actually exists today — XLOOKUP, dynamic arrays, and Copilot included, not the 2013 basics most guides still teach. 260 pages, a 30-day practice path, and an interactive companion tool designed to turn reference into reflex. Built to hand back 2–4 hours a week, permanently.

title: Python for the AI Era
subtitle: The No-Fluff Starter Guide
description: A direct path from zero to your first working AI tool — 19 chapters distilled into seven modules, with the theory stripped out and the projects left in. You'll leave with three real builds in your portfolio, including a GPT-powered tool connected to a live API, and a 90-day roadmap for what comes next.
